_comment: GSC 驱动的关键词扩充选题清单（源：gsc/0622 性能导出）。每簇含 english_targets（站点要顶上去的英文目标词，来自 GSC 有展示但卡第6-10页的词）与 cn_terms（喂给次幂 searchArticles 的中文检索词）。供 1b-crawl-keywords.mjs 采集中文源 → 2→3→4 合成英文深度长文。priority 越小越先做。

clusters.note: GSC: 'naver search ranking' 176展示/第14名(第2页,离首页最近)、多条 naver blog 词已在前10。性价比最高的快赢簇。

article.working_title: Naver SEO: The Complete Guide to Ranking on Korea's Top Search Engine
article.angle: How international brands and exporters win visibility on Naver — blog, SmartStore and integrated search — and how it differs from Google SEO.

clusters.note: GSC: 主力页 seo-dashboard-design 2428展示/第81名;seo monitoring dashboard 401、seo dashboard 324、analytics/reporting/reports-sharing 120+。展示池最大,做主题集群顶权重。

article.working_title: Building an SEO Dashboard: Metrics, Tools and Automated Reporting That Drive Decisions
article.angle: A practical blueprint for designing an SEO monitoring dashboard (Looker Studio/GA4/Search Console) that turns raw data into shareable, decision-ready reports.

clusters.note: GSC: multilingual seo 140、international-seo/multilingual 页 339+321展示/第85名。源极丰富(出海/外贸内容池)。

谷歌 多语言 优化

article.working_title: Multilingual SEO Best Practices: Hreflang, Site Structure and Global Keyword Strategy
article.angle: An end-to-end playbook for ranking a website in multiple languages and regions — hreflang, URL structure, localized content and common pitfalls.

clusters.note: GSC: ga4 seo 136、ga4 完整指南页 491展示/第77名。
cn_terms: GA4 谷歌分析 教程

article.working_title: Google Analytics 4 for SEO: Reports, Events and Metrics That Actually Matter
article.angle: How to use GA4 specifically for SEO — the reports, events and conversions that reveal organic performance, plus how to pair it with Search Console.

article.working_title: Local Keyword Research: Finding the Right Terms to Win Local Search
article.angle: A step-by-step method for uncovering high-intent local keywords and mapping them to pages, Google Business Profile and local content.
